name: NR arterial-stiffness trial is recruiting without posted results
summary: Recruiting phase 2 registry testing NR for elevated systolic blood pressure and arterial stiffness in middle-aged and older adults, with no posted results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT03821623 as recruiting with 118 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Middle-aged and older adults with elevated systolic blood pressure and arterial stiffness
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 118; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
